props.title: Eight of Eleven PRs on swarm-fund-mvp Are the Same Class of Bug
props.description: swarm-fund-mvp shifted from feature-shipping to single-bug-class defect-hardening — 8 of 11 PRs touched in the last 7 days target prior-week ADRs (089-095), and 3 of 4 open PRs share the one-bad-input-poisons-the-batch failure mode.
